description: German startup providing digital health platform for menopause support. Offers personalized care plans, coaching, and community for women experiencing menopause.
business_model: B2B - Employer contracts; B2C - Individual subscriptions
target_market: German employers and women seeking menopause support
competitive_advantage: First mover in menopause support for employers, clinical validation

varden_fit.rationale: Specialized women's health platform - could complement occupational health offering
